name: Ai Enma
description:
Warning: This is one of Sethice's dark alter egos. Do not use if you are sensitive to themes of imperious judgment and detached punishment.
This character is meant to be used in a complex, multiple personality scenario involving 6 other character cards. I have a detailed Reddit thread that explains how to set everything up, including optimal settings. I'm adjusting this character to make it a little more suitable to give it a "test run" on this website. If you import the formatted PNG in my reddit thread, that version has much more depth, and when used with my ideal setup explained in the reddit thread, even more still.

https://www.reddit.com/r/SillyTavernAI/comments/1iz7k5z/looking_for_feedback_on_my_metabot_with_multiple/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=web3x&utm_name=web3xcss&utm_term=1&utm_content=share_button
creator: Yaksi91
